value_add_thesis: Not applicable — Big Bend is on the buy-side. Useful as a deal-flow partner / strategic acquirer for smaller ILEC/WISP exits.

owner_name: Family-owned ILEC (Bewley/Wright family lineage per TX PUC)
layer1_comment: 89yr family ILEC, owner ~65 in prime natural-exit band. Tenure modifier max (+5). 3rd-4th generation likely.
layer2_comment: Recurring revenue base small (~1,150 subs) but BEAD-eligible coastal TX footprint has strategic land/spectrum value. Fiber buildout in-progress (+5). DSL still in mix (-5). Net 75.
layer3_comment: Very small subscriber base (moderate weight), DSL still in mix, very long tenure (high weight) — classic succession profile.
layer4_comment: Coastal/South TX ILEC — high PE/consolidator interest. VTX1 is active acquirer in nearby RGV.
final_comment: PRIME A-tier. 89-year family ILEC, 1,150 subs, multi-generational ownership. Fits ETA/search-fund deal size. Kleberg/Kenedy/Brooks coastal corridor has BEAD-eligible value.
value_add_thesis: Acquire micro-ILEC at ETA scale, modernize last-mile (retire DSL fully), pursue BEAD subgrants in Kenedy/Brooks, position for VTX1 or Hilliary exit in 3-5 years.

layer1_comment: 80yr Hendrix family ILEC, owner ~60, ~3rd generation. Strong tenure modifier (+5).
layer2_comment: 7k subs recurring revenue, FTTH+cable hybrid (capex committed +5), strong Gulf Coast commercial/petro backhaul demand. Good ETA/lower-middle-PE scale.
layer3_comment: Long family tenure (moderate), single-county footprint after 80 years (low). Engaged owner per current operations — not deep coast but not aggressive growth.
layer4_comment: Gulf Coast TX (Brazoria — petrochem corridor) — high enterprise backhaul value, strong PE interest.
final_comment: PRIME A-tier. 80yr Hendrix family ILEC, 7k subs, Gulf Coast petrochem corridor. Classic family-owned legacy ILEC with succession exposure + commercial backhaul value.
value_add_thesis: Acquire Hendrix family ILEC, modernize stack, expand petrochem/industrial backhaul ARPU, position for Hilliary or PE consolidator exit in 3-5 years.

owner_name: Family-owned ILEC (multi-generational, name not in spine)
layer1_comment: 95-year family ILEC — longest tenure in batch. Owner ~65, 3rd+ generation near-certain. Maximum tenure modifier.
layer2_comment: 4k subs recurring base, FTTH+DSL hybrid, 2-county lake/recreation footprint. Second-home density supports ARPU. Strong sellability at ETA scale.
layer3_comment: Very long family tenure (high weight), DSL still in mix, small subscriber base. Strong succession profile.
layer4_comment: Lake Livingston retirement/recreation corridor — premium broadband ARPU, strong PE/consolidator interest.
final_comment: PRIME A-tier #1 in batch. 95-year family ILEC, 4k subs, lake retirement corridor. Succession question is near-certain in 5-10 year horizon. Excellent ETA scale.
value_add_thesis: Acquire 95-yr family ILEC, retire DSL plant, capture BEAD subgrants for Polk/Houston county fiber, position for Hilliary/PE rollup exit.

layer1_comment: 73yr family ILEC, owner ~65, 2nd-3rd generation. Strong tenure modifier.
layer2_comment: Tiny scale (1.2k subs) — most acquirable price-wise but limited SBA leverage. FTTH primary (capex committed +5). Single-county.
layer3_comment: Very small subscriber base (moderate), single-town footprint, long family tenure. Classic small-ILEC silent coast.
layer4_comment: Lamar County NE TX corridor — Hilliary nearby, decent PE interest for small roll-up.
final_comment: A-tier. Tiny 73-yr ILEC (1.2k subs), smallest in batch = most affordable. Likely owner-operator nearing retirement. Classic small-ILEC roll-up target.
value_add_thesis: ETA micro-acquisition. Acquire, modernize portal/billing, capture BEAD, bolt onto Hilliary or other NE TX consolidator within 5 years.

layer1_comment: 73yr Terrell family ILEC, owner ~60, 2nd-3rd generation. Strong tenure modifier.
layer2_comment: 5k subs recurring revenue, FTTH+wireless hybrid (capex committed +5). Central TX 3-county footprint. Solid ETA scale.
layer3_comment: Long family tenure (moderate). Comanche/Eastland/Erath stable but no aggressive growth tells. Rebranded from Terrell Telephone — engaged but not consolidator.
layer4_comment: Central TX (Comanche county) — Hilliary's Lipan acquisition is direct competitor corridor. Strong consolidator interest.
final_comment: A-tier. 73-yr Terrell family ILEC, 5k subs, Hilliary corridor. Owner ~60 — slightly young but tenure + market pull + scale make this attractive.
value_add_thesis: Acquire Terrell family ILEC, optimize operations, position for Hilliary or PE exit in 3-5 years. Hilliary just bought Lipan TC nearby — clear comp.

layer1_comment: 77yr Gilmer family ILEC, owner ~65, 3rd+ generation. Strong tenure modifier (+5).
layer2_comment: 3k subs, FTTH+DSL+cellular. Capex partially committed (+5). DSL still in mix (-5). Hill Country edge — strategic value to GVTC/HCTC neighbors though co-op acquisition rare.
layer3_comment: DSL still in mix, very long family tenure (high weight), small subscriber base. Classic Gilmer family coast.
layer4_comment: SW TX (Edwards/Uvalde — Hill Country edge) — bordering GVTC/HCTC territory. Strong PE/private consolidator interest.
final_comment: A-tier. 77yr Gilmer family ILEC, 3k subs, SW TX Hill Country edge. Strong succession profile + market position. Cellular adds optionality.
value_add_thesis: Acquire Gilmer family ILEC, modernize plant, leverage cellular spectrum, position for VTX1/Hilliary exit in 3-5 years.

final_comment: B-tier. Solo Batavia 20yr WISP, classic silently-coasting solo immigrant founder profile common in TX rural WISP. SBA scale. Owner age verification could lift to A.
